S.FORM: Jerome Beasley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 5, Jerome Beasley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *erome ő≤eas~…ēlej s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *erome ő≤eas~…ēlej, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
